verse_text: Or if anyone should shove someone because of enmity, or should throw any tool at him from an ambush, and that one dies,

links.context: The woman's story of a blood feud between her sons parallels David's (see [[NUM.35:19]]-21 re the law of blood revenge). She presses the king to absolve this blood feud, which he does, indicative of the king's power as judge.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
